catalog_note: Seed catalog from official provider pages. The coach must verify the live source before registration, payment, booking, or exam launch.

blocked: take a live certification exam for the user
capture or summarize private exam content
register, pay, book, submit, or publish without explicit human approval

approval_checkpoints.label: Account or login
approval_checkpoints.agent_rule: The agent may describe the step, but the human enters credentials.

approval_checkpoints.label: Paid enrollment or exam fee
approval_checkpoints.agent_rule: The agent must show cost, target, and source before the human approves.

approval_checkpoints.label: Exam booking
approval_checkpoints.agent_rule: The agent may prepare a checklist, but the human schedules and confirms.

approval_checkpoints.label: Live exam
approval_checkpoints.agent_rule: The agent stays out of the exam environment and does not view or answer questions.

approval_checkpoints.label: Certificate sharing
approval_checkpoints.agent_rule: The agent drafts copy only; posting needs human approval.

certifications.title: Google Ads Search Certification
certifications.source_note: Google Skillshop lists Google Ads Search under Google Ads training and certifications.
certifications.portfolio_task: Build a local search campaign plan for Xalq Sigorta with objectives, keyword groups, negatives, ad copy, and KPI map.
certifications.mentor_move: Do one small audit of a real or demo search campaign before the exam; the badge is stronger when paired with a campaign teardown.

certifications.title: Google Ads Measurement Certification
certifications.source_note: Google Skillshop lists Google Ads Measurement under Google Ads training and certifications.
certifications.portfolio_task: Map Xalq Sigorta lead events from landing page to CRM to ad platform, including dedup and quality signals.
certifications.mentor_move: Pair this with GA4; it turns media buying from button-pushing into business measurement.

certifications.title: Google Analytics Certification
certifications.source_note: Google states Analytics Academy on Skillshop includes GA4 courses and a certification.
certifications.portfolio_task: Create a GA4 measurement brief for one Xalq Sigorta funnel with events, audiences, and a weekly dashboard outline.
certifications.mentor_move: Use the local GA4 Studio after each study block to turn theory into an actual dashboard habit.

certifications.title: Meta Certified Media Buying Professional
certifications.source_note: Meta Blueprint provides a Media Buying Professional study guide and a practice test for the certification exam.
certifications.portfolio_task: Prepare a Meta campaign post-mortem: objective, audience, creative hypothesis, learning phase notes, KPI tree, and next experiment.
certifications.mentor_move: Do not rush this badge. Treat it as a capstone after Google Ads + GA4 + two original mock exams at 85%.

certifications.title: LinkedIn Advertising Fundamentals Certification
certifications.source_note: LinkedIn states the exam is 60 questions, 60 minutes, and certifies Advertising Fundamentals for two years after passing.
certifications.portfolio_task: Design a LinkedIn lead-gen campaign for corporate insurance decision makers with personas, offer, targeting, and KPI logic.
certifications.mentor_move: This is a smart badge if the goal is B2B trust, employer branding, or corporate sales enablement.

certifications.title: LinkedIn Marketing Strategy Certification
certifications.source_note: LinkedIn Marketing Academy lists Marketing Strategy among its marketing certifications.
certifications.portfolio_task: Create a one-page full-funnel LinkedIn strategy for a corporate insurance product with organic, paid, and measurement layers.
certifications.mentor_move: Take this after Advertising Fundamentals if you want strategy credibility, not just platform operation.

certifications.title: TikTok Media Buying Certification
certifications.source_note: TikTok describes a two-hour proctored online exam for media buyers with at least one year of TikTok ads experience.
certifications.portfolio_task: Build a TikTok creative testing matrix: hooks, audiences, budget split, learning goal, and kill/scale rules.
certifications.mentor_move: Only schedule it after enough hands-on TikTok Ads Manager practice; the exam is proctored and experience-based.

certifications.title: Content Marketing Certification
certifications.source_note: HubSpot Academy lists Content Marketing Certification as a popular free online certification.
certifications.portfolio_task: Draft a 30-day insurance content calendar with search intent, post angle, CTA, and reuse plan.
certifications.mentor_move: Fast win: use it to build confidence, then prove the badge with a real content system in SEO Studio.

certifications.title: Social Media Marketing Certification
certifications.source_note: HubSpot Academy lists Social Media Marketing Certification as a popular free online marketing certification.
certifications.portfolio_task: Create a social content operating rhythm for one Xalq Sigorta product: weekly themes, approvals, and report cadence.
certifications.mentor_move: Good first badge for a marketer who needs momentum before harder paid-media exams.

certifications.title: SEO Toolkit / SEO Academy Certifications
certifications.source_note: Semrush Academy offers free marketing courses and certifications across SEO, content, analytics, paid advertising, PR, social, and AI.
certifications.portfolio_task: Run a SERP/content-gap brief for one insurance keyword and turn it into an SEO Studio article brief.
certifications.mentor_move: Pair the badge with one visible SEO deliverable; otherwise the credential is too easy to ignore.

certifications.title: Growth Marketing Minidegree
certifications.source_note: CXL describes the Growth Marketing Minidegree as a 15+ course program with certificate included and paid enrollment.
certifications.portfolio_task: Build a growth experiment backlog for Xalq Sigorta with ICE scores, expected impact, instrumentation, and decision rules.
certifications.mentor_move: This is the premium move when you want substance, not just badges; approve budget deliberately.
